title: Fix bottlenecks with controlled parallelism, capacity policy and safe workspace concurrency
core_principle: Controlled parallelism only: bounded, measurable, policy-approved concurrency across Hub, Worker, Ollama and workspace writes.
architecture_guardrails: Hub remains control plane for scheduling, policy and queue ownership.
Workers execute delegated work only; no worker-to-worker orchestration loops.
Security/default-deny remains upper bound for any throughput optimization.
All capacity decisions must be auditable with reason_code and decision refs.

observed: Ollama parallel runtime knobs are not consistently exposed/documented for all local profiles.
Autopilot effective concurrency can collapse to conservative caps without explicit operator visibility.
LLM bottlenecks are not uniformly observable across queue, dispatch, worker-propose and backend-call phases.
Worker busy/degraded/offline states can be conflated under long-running propose workloads.
Sequential strategy chaining can multiply total LLM latency per task.
Shared output_dir writes are a correctness risk under higher parallelism.
risk: Blindly raising concurrency can overload VRAM and increase failure/retry storms.
Removing serialization without bounded replacement can introduce subprocess/session races.
Aggressive polling/health tuning does not fix single-thread or blocked request paths.
Uncoordinated workspace writes can corrupt generated artifacts.

references.reason: Primary analysis document; must match real effective concurrency semantics.
Primary place for Ollama runtime env knobs in baseline stack.
Effective concurrency derivation and policy cap handling.
Dispatch path and trace timing instrumentation.
Worker liveness and effective load semantics.
File write paths and containment checks under concurrent execution.
Proposal budget and strategy chaining constraints.
Existing diagnostics endpoints to extend and reuse.
Existing queue/revalidation/capacity logic to avoid duplicate implementations.

milestones.title: Bounded capacity
milestones.goal: Compute effective concurrency from policy + runtime limits, never from requested value alone.

milestones.title: Safe parallel execution
milestones.goal: Improve throughput while preserving deterministic safety and workspace integrity.

milestones.title: Async readiness
milestones.goal: Design async dispatch behind flag only after M0-M2 are stable.

tasks.title: Correct bottleneck documentation semantics
tasks.description: Document that effective concurrency is policy- and capacity-bounded, and can fail closed to conservative values.
acceptance_criteria: Explicit formula/pseudocode for effective concurrency is present.
Document warns against naive max_concurrency increases.
Security cap is explicitly documented as upper bound.

tasks.title: Standardize Ollama runtime knobs in baseline compose
required_changes: Document VRAM class recommendations and rollback guidance.
acceptance_criteria: No code change required to tune Ollama parallelism.
Defaults remain conservative.
Docs include VRAM caution and tuning table.

tasks.title: Harden effective concurrency calculation
tasks.description: Refine/validate existing effective concurrency with strict fail-closed behavior and explicit status visibility.
acceptance_criteria: Effective concurrency = min(requested, security_cap, online_worker_capacity, runtime_capacity, ollama_capacity).
Invalid/missing values fail closed to conservative bounded values.
Computed value is exposed in status/debug output.
Security cap always remains the final upper bound.

tasks.title: Regression tests for effective concurrency
test_cases: worker count below cap -> worker limited
ollama capacity below requested -> ollama limited

tasks.title: Add end-to-end bottleneck timing metrics
acceptance_criteria: Task trace includes queue, dispatch, propose, execute timestamps.
LLM timing includes backend/provider tags.
At least one integration test proves metrics population.

tasks.title: Controlled concurrency benchmark harness
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark matrix includes 1/2/4 concurrency tiers.
JSON output + markdown summary with p50/p95 timings.
Optional VRAM snapshot if nvidia-smi exists.
Runs locally without cloud dependency.

tasks.title: Replace global SGPT serialization with bounded per-backend semaphores
acceptance_criteria: No global exclusive lock for all SGPT calls.
Per-backend semaphore caps remain bounded and conservative by default.
Permit release is guaranteed on success/timeout/exception.
Exhaustion visibility via metric or debug log.

tasks.title: Regression tests for SGPT semaphore release
Separate worker busy, degraded and offline semantics
acceptance_criteria: Long-running propose does not incorrectly force offline.
Dispatcher throttles busy workers without marking offline.
Offline reserved for unreachable/repeated hard failure.

tasks.title: Verify worker HTTP concurrency under load
acceptance_criteria: Current serving mode documented (thread/process model).
Measured /health latency during artificial long propose call.
If single-thread bottleneck confirmed, follow-up implementation task created with concrete server profile and DoD.

tasks.title: Worker health under load regression test
Proposal budget per task
acceptance_criteria: Total proposal budget enforced in addition to per-call timeout.
Budget exhaustion produces explicit reason_code.
Successful single-strategy path remains unaffected.

tasks.title: Protect shared output_dir from parallel write conflicts
acceptance_criteria: Default blocks concurrent writes to same canonical output_dir.
Lock release guaranteed on completion/failure/timeout.
Stale lock recovery with explicit threshold and audit trail.
Conflict reason_code: output_dir_busy or workspace_write_conflict.

tasks.title: Canonical path validation aligned with write-lock policy
acceptance_criteria: Resolved canonical paths used for lock identity.
Path traversal and symlink escapes rejected.
Containment checks use canonical/commonpath semantics, never prefix string checks.

tasks.title: Async propose dispatch behind feature flag
Event bus evaluation after baseline
acceptance_criteria: Document what Redis/event bus solves and what it does not.
Document operational cost and failure modes.
State explicitly that P0/P1 fixes do not depend on Redis.

definition_of_done: Ollama parallelism is configurable and benchmarked with conservative defaults.
Effective autopilot concurrency is policy- and capacity-derived, never guessed.
SGPT/backend concurrency is bounded by safe semaphores with leak-free permit handling.
Worker liveness differentiates busy/degraded/offline correctly under load.
Proposal execution uses explicit budget constraints with deterministic reason codes.
Shared output_dir writes are protected by canonical lock ownership.
Metrics show bottleneck movement before/after tuning.
Async dispatch is feature-flagged and introduced only after stable bounded baseline.
Docs reflect controlled parallelism, rollback steps and operator safety constraints.

sprint_now.name: BOTTLENECKS-S1
sprint_now.objective: Ship measurable and safe capacity baseline before deeper architecture changes.

suggested_commits: docs: refine bottleneck analysis with controlled parallelism semantics
config: expose ollama runtime knobs and capacity defaults
fix: harden effective autopilot concurrency calculation
test: add regression coverage for capacity and concurrency caps
perf: add controlled concurrency benchmark harness

task_summaries.BOT-QA-002: Added tests for SGPT backend semaphore permit release on success, timeout, and exception (5/5 new tests green).
task_summaries.BOT-P1-002: Implemented worker state differentiation: health monitoring preserves busy/degraded states; registry marks busy when load reaches max_parallel; offline only on repeated hard failure/staleness.
task_summaries.BOT-P1-003: Serving mode documented: worker runs Flask threaded=True. Direct socket latency benchmark under synthetic long propose remains open due sandbox bind restrictions.
task_summaries.BOT-QA-003: Added regression tests for worker health under load semantics (busy state does not flap to offline; busy workers are not routable).
task_summaries.BOT-P1-006: Implemented output-dir lock service with canonical path identity and stale lease recovery; integrated lock acquire/release in scoped task execution path with conflict reason_code output_dir_busy.
task_summaries.BOT-P1-007: Canonical path handling hardened: workspace output_dir resolution and tool file access now rely on realpath/commonpath semantics; traversal/symlink escape via prefix checks is prevented.
task_summaries.BOT-QA-004: Added regression tests for shared output_dir locking conflicts, canonical identity, and workspace-root containment rejection.
task_summaries.BOT-P1-004: Implemented proposal budget controls in autopilot strategy execution (`max_total_seconds`, `max_llm_calls`, `max_strategy_attempts`) with explicit `reason_code=proposal_budget_exhausted` on exhaustion.
task_summaries.BOT-P1-005: Added event-aware autopilot wakeups for task lifecycle and worker lifecycle signals (`task_created/completed/failed`, `worker_registered`, `worker_status_changed`, `worker_capacity_released`).
task_summaries.BOT-DOC-001: Updated operator docs: controlled parallelism knobs, worker liveness semantics, proposal budget behavior, and safe measurement guidance across BOTTLENECKS_ANALYSIS, README, and docs/performance.md.
task_summaries.BOT-P0-001: Bottleneck documentation semantics refined with explicit fail-closed rule and security-cap upper-bound language.
task_summaries.BOT-P0-002: Ollama runtime knobs standardized in baseline compose and .env example (`OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL`, `OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS`, `OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE`) plus README operator guidance.
task_summaries.BOT-P0-003: Effective concurrency hardened to bounded min(requested, security_cap, worker_capacity, runtime_capacity, ollama_capacity) with conservative defaults and debug factor exposure.
task_summaries.BOT-QA-001: Added regression suite for effective concurrency: missing cap fallback, capping, worker-limited, ollama-limited, invalid-input fail-closed.
task_summaries.BOT-P0-004: Added core bottleneck metrics instrumentation (queue wait, dispatch wait, propose duration, strategy attempts, busy time, failure reason, workspace conflicts). Full integration assertion coverage remains open.
task_summaries.BOT-P0-005: Added controlled concurrency benchmark harness (`scripts/benchmark_concurrency.py`) producing JSON + markdown p50/p95 summary and optional nvidia-smi snapshot.
task_summaries.BOT-P1-001: Global SGPT serialization replaced by bounded per-backend semaphores with guaranteed release and exhaustion warning logs.
task_summaries.BOT-P2-001: Added async dispatch protocol specification document with flag behavior, safety boundaries and DoD.
task_summaries.BOT-P2-002: Implemented feature-flagged async autopilot dispatch (`autopilot.async_dispatch_enabled`) with non-blocking tick behavior and error-to-task propagation.
task_summaries.BOT-P2-003: Added event-bus evaluation document clarifying benefits, non-goals, operational cost, and explicit independence of P0/P1 fixes from Redis.
